title: Tick Control Northern Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Northern Brooklyn. Protect your family from Lyme disease with expert tick treatments. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Northern Brooklyn neighborhoods like Greenpoint, Williamsburg, and Bushwick face increasing tick populations due to growing green spaces and proximity to McCarren and McGolrick Parks. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services tailored to Northern Brooklyn's unique urban landscape, protecting your family, pets, and outdoor spaces from tick-borne diseases. Our eco-friendly treatments range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Northern Brooklyn for over 15 years, with licensed technicians who understand the specific tick challenges in areas near the East River waterfront and local community gardens. We use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while providing long-lasting protection against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other dangerous species common to the area.
localContext: Northern Brooklyn's mix of vintage brownstones, modern condos, and popular parks like East River State Park and Brooklyn Bridge Park creates ideal habitats for tick populations. From the leafy streets of Fort Greene to the industrial-turned-residential areas of East Williamsburg, our team knows where ticks thrive and how to effectively eliminate them from your property.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Northern Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Northern Brooklyn typically range from $125 for small yards and gardens to $325 for larger properties or severe infestations. We provide free inspections and customized quotes based on your property size and specific needs.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Northern Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Northern Brooklyn from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, mild winters mean ticks can be present year-round, so preventative treatments in early spring are highly recommended.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are completely safe for children and pets once dry, typically within 2-3 hours of application. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for re-entry and answer any safety questions you may have.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick control service in Northern Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend quarterly tick treatments throughout the active season, with at least two applications during peak months. Properties near parks or with dense vegetation may benefit from monthly treatments during summer months.
